task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ArkCase using the provided administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase login screen with 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' entered, or the ArkCase dashboard with the admin user profile visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Administration or Security management section of ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase Administration module, specifically a section related to Users, Groups, or Security.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located either the user 'alex_rookie' or the group 'FOIA_Processors'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a search or list containing the user 'alex_rookie' or the group 'FOIA_Processors' selected or visible in the main content area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent is actively assigning the user to the group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an edit dialog, dual-listbox, or assignment screen where 'alex_rookie' is being added to 'FOIA_Processors' (or vice versa).

task_completion.description: Verify the assignment was successfully saved and completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a success confirmation message, or a final state where 'alex_rookie' is explicitly listed as a member of the 'FOIA_Processors' group (or the group is listed under the user's memberships).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like samba-tool or kubectl) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction exclusively within a web browser navigating the ArkCase UI, with no terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to perform the assignment.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ArkCase web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a valid URL for the ArkCase instance, and the interface should be the functional ArkCase web application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected outcome into a text editor or document.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad, Vim, or Nano) used to display the words 'alex_rookie' or 'FOIA_Processors' as a substitute for actual system configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'alex_rookie'. Target Group: 'FOIA_Processors'. Admin User: 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'. The assignment must be performed via the ArkCase web interface. Do not accept terminal commands (e.g., samba-tool via kubectl in the arkcase-ldap-0 pod) as a valid completion method for this UI-based task.
